topWPAPlays.description: Henry Davis homers (8) on a fly ball to left field. Marcell Ozuna scores.
Ryan O'Hearn doubles (13) on a fly ball to right fielder Sal Frelick. Esmerlyn Valdez scores.
Jackson Chourio doubles (17) on a sharp line drive to right fielder Esmerlyn Valdez. Christian Yelich scores.
Marcell Ozuna singles on a line drive to center fielder Garrett Mitchell. Ryan O'Hearn scores.
Marcell Ozuna homers (8) on a fly ball to left field.
Leody Taveras homers (4) on a fly ball to center field. Blaze Alexander scores.
Leody Taveras singles on a ground ball to center fielder Lane Thomas. Blaze Alexander scores. Tyler O'Neill to 3rd.
Isaac Collins triples (1) on a ground ball to right fielder Leody Taveras. Josh Rojas scores.
Jeremiah Jackson hits a ground-rule double (10) on a fly ball to right-center field. Tyler O'Neill scores. Leody Taveras to 3rd.
Salvador Perez strikes out swinging.
Ben Rice triples (3) on a sharp fly ball to left fielder Daylen Lile. Max Schuemann scores. Trent Grisham scores.
Keibert Ruiz reaches on a throwing error by second baseman Jazz Chisholm Jr. Nasim Nuñez scores. Keibert Ruiz to 2nd.
Curtis Mead homers (17) on a fly ball to center field.
Austin Wells singles on a line drive to right fielder James Wood. Jazz Chisholm Jr. scores.
Daylen Lile lines into an unassisted double play, first baseman Ben Rice. CJ Abrams out at 1st.
Alex Bregman homers (9) on a fly ball to left center field. Pete Crow-Armstrong scores. Seiya Suzuki scores.
Eugenio Suárez homers (11) on a fly ball to left field. JJ Bleday scores.
Kevin Alcántara singles on a ground ball to center fielder Spencer Steer. Carson Kelly scores. Michael Busch scores. Ian Happ to 3rd.
Pete Crow-Armstrong singles on a ground ball to right fielder Noelvi Marte, deflected by first baseman Sal Stewart. Dansby Swanson scores.
Michael Busch doubles (17) on a fly ball to right fielder Noelvi Marte. Carson Kelly to 3rd.
Masataka Yoshida lines into a double play, second baseman Zack Short to shortstop Francisco Lindor. Andruw Monasterio out at 2nd.
Jarren Duran singles on a fly ball to right fielder Carson Benge. Tsung-Che Cheng scores. Caleb Durbin to 3rd. Andruw Monasterio to 2nd.
Andruw Monasterio walks. Ceddanne Rafaela scores. Tsung-Che Cheng to 3rd. Caleb Durbin to 2nd.
Jorge Polanco strikes out swinging.
Bo Bichette grounds out to first baseman Andruw Monasterio.
J.P. Crawford doubles (9) on a line drive to left fielder Chandler Simpson. Mitch Garver scores. Cole Young scores. Buddy Kennedy to 3rd.
Randy Arozarena homers (11) on a fly ball to right center field. Buddy Kennedy scores. J.P. Crawford scores.
Randy Arozarena grounds into a double play, second baseman Richie Palacios to first baseman Jonathan Aranda. J.P. Crawford out at 2nd. Randy Arozarena out at 1st.
Cole Young singles on a sharp line drive to right fielder Victor Mesa Jr. Josh Naylor to 3rd. Mitch Garver to 2nd.
Weston Wilson homers (2) on a fly ball to left field.

J.T. Realmuto doubles (11) on a line drive to left fielder Riley Greene. Bryce Harper scores. Alec Bohm scores. Brandon Marsh scores. J.T. Realmuto to 3rd. J.T. Realmuto advances to 3rd, on a throwing error by shortstop Kevin McGonigle.
Kyle Schwarber singles on a line drive to left fielder Riley Greene. J.T. Realmuto scores. Kyle Schwarber to 2nd.
Bryson Stott doubles (17) on a ground ball to right fielder Matt Vierling. J.T. Realmuto to 3rd.
Trea Turner strikes out swinging.
Derek Hill called out on strikes.
Brayan Rocchio homers (8) on a fly ball to right field.
Xavier Edwards singles on a ground ball to left fielder Steven Kwan. Heriberto Hernández scores.
Brayan Rocchio singles on a ground ball to right fielder Javier Sanoja. Travis Bazzana scores. Brayan Rocchio to 2nd.
Rece Hinds strikes out swinging.
Leo Jiménez walks. Xavier Edwards to 3rd. Javier Sanoja to 2nd.
Jo Adell grounds into a double play, shortstop Ryan Kreidler to second baseman Kody Clemens to first baseman Royce Lewis. Nolan Schanuel out at 2nd. Jo Adell out at 1st.
Ryan Jeffers doubles (9) on a line drive to left fielder Jo Adell. Ryan Kreidler scores. Trevor Larnach scores.
Trevor Larnach singles on a ground ball to right fielder Jorge Soler. Luke Keaschall scores. Ryan Kreidler to 3rd.
Nolan Schanuel singles on a line drive to right fielder Alan Roden. Mike Trout to 3rd.
Josh Lowe homers (8) on a fly ball to right center field.
Kyle Teel singles on a line drive to right fielder Lawrence Butler. Munetaka Murakami scores. Miguel Vargas scores. Andrew Benintendi to 3rd.
Braden Montgomery homers (3) on a fly ball to right field. Andrew Benintendi scores. Kyle Teel scores.
Shea Langeliers homers (21) on a fly ball to left field.
Sam Antonacci homers (6) on a fly ball to right field.
Miguel Vargas doubles (20) on a line drive to left fielder Colby Thomas. Munetaka Murakami to 3rd.
Mauricio Dubón reaches on a throwing error by shortstop Masyn Winn. Ozzie Albies scores. Michael Harris II to 3rd.
José Fermín singles on a line drive to center fielder Michael Harris II. Jordan Walker scores. Lars Nootbaar scores. Masyn Winn to 3rd.
Brewer Hicklen doubles (1) on a sharp line drive to center fielder Nathan Church. Jim Jarvis scores.

Braves challenged (tag play), call on the field was overturned: Braves challenged (home-plate collision), call on the field was upheld: Drake Baldwin singles on a line drive to right fielder Jordan Walker. Austin Riley scores. Brewer Hicklen to 2nd.
Ozzie Albies doubles (21) on a sharp line drive to left fielder Bryan Torres.
Kyle Higashioka homers (7) on a line drive to left field.
Cam Smith homers (12) on a fly ball to left field.
Isaac Paredes singles on a line drive to center fielder Evan Carter. Zach Dezenzo scores. Yainer Diaz scores. Yordan Alvarez to 2nd.
Jeremy Peña grounds into a double play, shortstop Ezequiel Duran to second baseman Cam Cauley to first baseman Jake Burger. Yainer Diaz out at 2nd. Jeremy Peña out at 1st.
Wyatt Langford singles on a line drive to left fielder Zach Dezenzo. Wyatt Langford to 2nd. Wyatt Langford advances to 2nd, on a fielding error by left fielder Zach Dezenzo.
Bryce Eldridge singles on a ground ball to right fielder Jake McCarthy. Rafael Devers to 3rd.
Drew Gilbert singles on a line drive to left fielder Troy Johnston. Bryce Eldridge scores. Willy Adames to 2nd.
Casey Schmitt grounds into a double play, pitcher Michael Lorenzen to second baseman Tyler Freeman to first baseman TJ Rumfield. Luis Arraez out at 2nd. Casey Schmitt out at 1st.
Jake McCarthy hits an inside-the-park home run (10) on a fly ball to right field.
Heliot Ramos flies out sharply to right fielder Jake McCarthy.
Freddie Freeman grounds into a double play, first baseman Tim Tawa to shortstop Geraldo Perdomo. Andy Pages out at 2nd. Freddie Freeman out at 1st.
Tommy Edman singles on a fly ball to left fielder Lourdes Gurriel Jr. Shohei Ohtani scores. Andy Pages scores. Tommy Edman to 2nd.
Lourdes Gurriel Jr. reaches on a fielder's choice. Geraldo Perdomo scores. Gabriel Moreno to 3rd. Throwing error by third baseman Max Muncy.
Tim Tawa homers (3) on a fly ball to center field.
Andy Pages walks.
Jonatan Clase singles on a line drive to center fielder Jackson Merrill. Daulton Varsho scores. Alejandro Kirk to 2nd.
Ernie Clement homers (8) on a fly ball to left field. Andrés Giménez scores.
Manny Machado singles on a line drive to center fielder Daulton Varsho. Xander Bogaerts scores.
Ty France out on a sacrifice fly to center fielder Daulton Varsho. Jase Bowen scores.
Nathan Lukes homers (5) on a fly ball to right field.
